title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama, enabling easy integration of local LLMs into Python apps.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript library for Ollama, allowing Node.js and browser integration.

title: langchain-ollama

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced CLI wrapper around Ollama with additional utilities and model management features.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama with chat UI, model management, and multi-user support.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like autocomplete using Ollama models for local code completion.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot integration for Ollama, allowing users to chat with local LLMs in Discord servers.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot that integrates Ollama models into Slack workspaces for team collaboration.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot for Ollama, enabling private and group chats with local language models.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Docker containers and docker-compose setups for easy Ollama deployment and scaling.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Kubernetes Helm charts for deploying Ollama in production environments with auto-scaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation implementation using Ollama with vector databases for Q&A.

title: ollama-agents
summary: Multi-agent framework built on Ollama for creating collaborative AI agent systems.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit-based web app for interactive Ollama model exploration and comparison.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI wrapper around Ollama with additional endpoints, authentication, and rate limiting.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package for Ollama JavaScript client, enabling Node.js applications to use local LLMs.

title: ollama-python-sdk
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama, providing simple Pythonic interface to local language models.

title: ollama-model-library

title: ollama-reddit-discussion
